PROOF OF SERVICE OF VERIFIED PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS' LIEN; NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN; PROPOSED ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWONG, PATRICK DBA PATRICK KG CONSTRUCTION SERVED DEC-20-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, LAMBERT IND/DBA GOLDEN STATE PLUMBING

LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS' LIEN CONTINUED FROM JAN-16-2002 TO LAW AND MOTION AT FEB-06-2002, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 BY REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTED BY ERIC THRONE. CSR 7855 (GPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics' Lien
Off Calendar Feb-06-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Tentative ruling adopted as the order of the Court: Petition to release property from mechanics' lien is granted -- no opposition filed. Attorneys fees of $962.50, $700 for this petition and $262 for hearing is denied -- insufficient evidence to justify award of attorneys fees. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics' Lien
Off Calendar Jan-16-2002 Continued To Feb-06-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 6, 2002 PER MOVING PARTY. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
